info.title: Recruitee API
info.description: Recruitee is an Applicant Tracking System (ATS) and collaborative hiring platform. This API provides programmatic access to manage candidates, job offers, departments, pipeline stages, tags, notes, tasks, and placements within your Recruitee account.

tags.name: Candidates
tags.description: Manage candidates in your talent pool

tags.name: Pipeline Templates
tags.description: Manage hiring pipeline templates and stages

tags.name: Offer Pipeline
tags.description: Manage pipeline templates and stages assigned to specific offers

tags.name: Notes
tags.description: Manage notes on candidates, offers, and other resources

tags.name: Tasks
tags.description: Manage tasks related to candidates and hiring

tags.name: Placements
tags.description: Manage candidate placements within offer pipelines

get.description: Retrieve a list of candidates for the company.

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Filter candidates created after this date (ISO 8601)

post.description: Create a new candidate in the company.

offers.description: List of offer IDs to assign the candidate to

get.description: Retrieve a single candidate by ID.

patch.description: Update an existing candidate.

get.description: Retrieve potential duplicate candidates for a given candidate.

patch.description: Merge a candidate with another candidate.

source_candidate_id.description: ID of the candidate to merge into the primary candidate

patch.description: Follow a candidate to receive updates about them.
Stop following a candidate.
Mark a candidate profile as viewed by the current admin.

get.description: Check if a candidate exists by email.
Get counts of candidates by various criteria.
Search for candidates similar to specified criteria.

post.description: Bulk import candidates from a file or data source.

offer_id.description: Offer ID to assign imported candidates to

get.description: Retrieve sources for a candidate.

post.description: Add an admin as a follower of a candidate.

admin_id.description: Admin ID to add as follower

delete.description: Remove an admin as a follower of a candidate.

get.description: Retrieve a list of job offers for the company.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Filter by scope (e.g., active, archived, closed, draft)

get.description: Retrieve a single job offer by ID.

patch.description: Update an existing job offer.

delete.description: Delete a job offer by ID.

patch.description: Publish a job offer to make it publicly visible.
Unpublish a job offer to remove it from public view.
Close a job offer (mark position as filled or no longer available).
Archive a job offer.
Unarchive a previously archived job offer.
Move a job offer back to draft status.
Create a duplicate copy of a job offer.
Follow a job offer to receive updates.
Stop following a job offer.

post.description: Add an existing candidate to a job offer, creating a placement.

candidate_id.description: ID of the candidate to add

get.description: Retrieve all departments for the company.
Retrieve a single department by ID.

patch.description: Update an existing department.
Merge a department into another department.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Source department ID (will be merged and removed)

target_id.description: Target department ID to merge into

get.description: Retrieve all pipeline templates for the company.
Retrieve a single pipeline template by ID.

delete.description: Delete a pipeline template by ID.

post.description: Create a copy of an existing pipeline template.

patch.description: Set a pipeline template as the default for new offers.

pipeline_template_id.description: ID of the pipeline template to set as default

patch.description: Reorder pipeline templates by updating their positions.

ids.description: Ordered list of pipeline template IDs

post.description: Add a new stage to a pipeline template.

patch.description: Update a stage within a pipeline template.
Reorder stages within a pipeline template.

get.description: Get pipeline templates associated with a specific offer.

post.description: Add a new stage to an offer's pipeline.

patch.description: Reorder stages within an offer's pipeline.

get.description: Retrieve all tags for the company.

patch.description: Update an existing tag.
Merge a tag into another tag.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Source tag ID (will be merged and removed)

target_id.description: Target tag ID to merge into

post.description: Add a tag to a candidate.

delete.description: Remove a tag from a candidate.

get.description: Retrieve all notes for a candidate.

post.description: Create a new note on a candidate.

get.description: Retrieve all notes for an offer.

post.description: Create a new note on an offer.

patch.description: Update an existing note.
Pin a note to keep it prominently visible.
Unpin a previously pinned note.
Update the checklist items within a note.

get.description: Retrieve all tasks for the company.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Filter by task scope (e.g., mine, completed)

get.description: Retrieve a single task by ID.

patch.description: Update an existing task.

get.description: Retrieve all tasks associated with a candidate.

post.description: Create a new placement (assign a candidate to an offer pipeline).

delete.description: Remove a candidate from an offer pipeline.

patch.description: Move a candidate to a different stage in the pipeline.
Mark a candidate as disqualified in an offer pipeline.
Requalify a previously disqualified candidate in an offer pipeline.

get.description: Get hiring details for a placement.

patch.description: Update hiring details for a placement.

get.description: Retrieve all placements (candidate applications) for a specific offer.
Search for candidates using various filters and criteria.
Perform a quick search across candidates, offers, and other entities.

BearerAuth.description: Recruitee API token. Obtain from your Recruitee account settings under Apps & Plugins > Personal API Tokens.

followed.description: Whether the current admin follows this candidate

viewed.description: Whether the current admin has viewed this candidate

offers_count.description: Number of offers in this department

is_default.description: Whether this is the default template

candidates_count.description: Number of candidates with this tag

admin_id.description: ID of the admin who created the note
Admin ID to assign the task to
